creator: raul.cheleguini@gmail.com
text:
Hi there,

From the ports collection, it is not possible to install acroread9 as suggested in Handbook:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/desktop-viewers.html

The port's state is DEPRECATED.

Port:	print/acroread9
Moved:	
Date:	2014-08-30
Reason:	Deprecated: many security issues are reported and Adobe no longer actively supports Adobe Reader for Unix

---


An alternative would be to recommend the ePDFView tool:

"ePDFView is a lightweight PDF document viewer that only uses the GTK+ and Poppler libraries. It is currently under development, but already opens most PDF files (even encrypted), save copies of documents, and has support for printing using CUPS."

http://freecode.com/projects/epdfview

Already in ports collection: ports/graphics/epdfview/
